title: meliosma subcordata
intro: Meliosma subcordata, also known as the Philippine Meliosma, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Meliosma subcordata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Meliosma subcordata is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or extracted into capsules and tinctures for its medicinal and health-promoting effects.
